title: Apple may unveil a new device subscription service as soon as next week - Engadget
summary: The publication indicated this partnership will enable Apple to offer hardware through a subscription program "without taking on the financial responsibility." The companies already work together, as Apple has offered Klarna as a buy now, pay later option in Apple Pay since…
